episode.title: MTG Fast Finance Ep 490: Top EDH Cards of Final Fantasy and EOE
episode.description:
James and Cliff go over the hottest paper and digital cardboard this week, the latest metagame results, their cards to watch for the week and check with EDHREC to examine the top EDH cars from FIN and EOE.

Intro/Outro Music by Skylarka
